name: prompt-engineer
description: Prompt engineering discipline for Claude Code plugins. An agent (prompt-engineer) enforces quality rules across actors and knowledge files. Knowledge files: actor-ground-rules (10 rules), quality-checks (KISS/DRY, AI sweep, context budget, severity levels), separation-of-concerns (classification + boundary violations). Commands: prompt-review (scan for violations), prompt-optimize (fix violations), prompt-create (scaffold new prompts).
